gold.title: Financial Markets Table
gold.reason: Framer Motion animated rows, theme-aware, real-time market data display with country flags and sparkline-style returns — looks premium on a fintech or SaaS landing page out of the box.

gold.title: Leads Data Table
gold.reason: AnimatePresence-powered row transitions, sortable columns, status badges, and action menus — a compelling CRM/sales tool showcase component instantly recognisable on a SaaS marketing page.

gold.title: Contacts Table With Modal
gold.reason: Framer Motion animations, slide-in contact detail modal, avatar support, theme-aware design — visually distinctive and perfect for a people-management or HR SaaS demo section.

gold.title: Interactive Logs Table
gold.reason: Observability-grade animated log panel with expandable rows, animated filter chips, and search — ideal for developer tools or DevOps SaaS showcases.

gold.title: Inline Analytics Table
gold.reason: Embeds progress bars and TrendingUp/TrendingDown icons directly in cells alongside revenue figures — turns a plain table into a miniature analytics dashboard, very marketable.

gold.title: Resizable Table
gold.reason: Framer Motion + react-resizable columns with animated presence, download actions, and theme support — rare interactive capability that reads as premium product polish.

gold.title: Table (micka_design)
gold.reason: Framer Motion + AnimatePresence on every row with custom context-based composition API — among the most technically sophisticated table primitives in the set, highly adaptable.

gold.title: Ultra Quality Data Table
gold.reason: Full pagination, sorting, status badge variants (Active/Pending/Banned), and mock-data generation — a complete self-contained data table ready for SaaS user management demos.

gold.title: Reorderable Table
gold.reason: Drag-to-reorder rows with checkboxes and dropdown actions — an interactive capability that elevates any product page demo showing a task or workflow management tool.

gold.title: Server Management Table
gold.reason: AnimatePresence for row transitions, live Power/Pause/Play/Restart action buttons, theme-aware — immediately conveys an infrastructure or cloud SaaS product when shown in a landing page.

silver.title: Product Table
silver.reason: Full TanStack Table integration with sorting, filtering, pagination, and column visibility — feature-complete and clean but no standout animations or visual flair.

silver.title: Project Data Table
silver.reason: Framer Motion rows, avatars, and CVA badge variants in a project-tracking layout — good quality and reusable for project management or team dashboards.

silver.title: Data Table Filter
silver.reason: Advanced faceted filtering, pagination, and multi-column sort using TanStack Table — technically impressive but visually conservative; great for functional demos.

silver.title: Column Collaboration Table
silver.reason: Popover-based column editing with footer summaries — a unique UX pattern that differentiates it, though the overall aesthetic is standard shadcn.

silver.title: Minimisable Table
silver.reason: Collapsible column groups with dropdown controls — adds a thoughtful UX layer; useful for dashboards but lacks animation polish for landing page hero use.

silver.title: Table With Dialog
silver.reason: Combines checkboxes, action dialogs, and a footer total row — a solid real-world pattern; functional and clean, not visually distinctive.

silver.title: Table Dialog
silver.reason: Badge-tagged rows with dropdown and modal integration — a common but well-executed admin pattern; reliable silver utility.

silver.title: Table Edit
silver.reason: Inline editing with checkbox multi-select and dropdown actions — practical CRUD table; clean but deep in the dashboard category.

silver.title: Member List
silver.reason: Avatar stacks, Radix tooltip for overflow members, and date formatting — a polished team-management component that works well in a product showcase.

silver.title: Animated Table Rows
silver.reason: Row entrance animations layered on standard shadcn Table primitives — a meaningful upgrade over static tables; usable in landing page feature sections.

silver.title: Animated Table
silver.reason: Animated table wrapper building on shadcn primitives — similar to animated-table-rows; solid reusable base but less distinctive than the row-specific variant.

silver.title: Basic Data Table
silver.reason: Self-contained sort, filter, and custom cell renderer — a clean generic solution but the name and scope signal basic utility rather than premium appeal.

silver.title: Fixed Header Footer Table
silver.reason: Sticky header/footer with balance totals — a functional UX necessity done cleanly, but not visually exciting enough for Gold.

silver.title: Contributors Overview Table
silver.reason: Status badges and balance columns in a contributors layout — clear and well-structured for an open-source or team tool showcase, but plain in styling.

bronze.title: Table (shadcn)
bronze.reason: Bare shadcn Table primitive with no demo data or interactivity — a building block, not a showcase component.

bronze.title: Data Table (shadcn)
bronze.reason: Reference shadcn data-table pattern — minimal styling, intended as a copy-paste base; too plain for direct customer website use.

bronze.title: Type Table
bronze.reason: Documentation-style type-definition table with info popovers — highly specific to component library docs, not useful for customer-facing redesigns.

bronze.title: Table (haydenbleasel)
bronze.reason: Custom table header wrappers with dropdown sorting — functional but minimal, no visual differentiation from stock shadcn output.

bronze.title: Table (react-aria-components)
bronze.reason: React Aria accessible table with resizable columns — accessibility-first but visually identical to a plain HTML table; too utility-focused for landing pages.

bronze.title: Table (jollyshopland)
bronze.reason: Another React Aria resizable table variant — same profile as jolbol1; no differentiated visual design.

bronze.title: Table (sean0205)
bronze.reason: Minimal semantic table wrapper with data-slot attributes — a utility primitive with no demo context or interactive value.

bronze.title: Table (shugar)
bronze.reason: Composable sub-component table (Colgroup, Header, Body) with minimal Tailwind styling — a raw primitive, not a presentational component.

bronze.title: Table (MUI DataGrid)
bronze.reason: MUI DataGrid wrapper — imports Material UI into a Tailwind/shadcn ecosystem; ecosystem mismatch makes it impractical for most redesign projects.

bronze.title: List 2
bronze.reason: A card-based list with icons and separators — not truly a table; mismatched category and better described as a feature list block.
